# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and the feature/pillar it affects.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No BSN collection, storage, processing or transmission.
- [ ] RLS/consent boundaries are preserved.
- [ ] Elder-facing copy is calm and non-shaming.
- [ ] Accessibility labels are present for interactive elements.
- [ ] Storage access remains private/signed.
- [ ] Sensitive logs are scrubbed.
- [ ] Tests updated or confirmed not required.

## Validation

```bash
corepack pnpm test
```

## Data/compliance impact

Describe any new data category, retention change or vendor impact.
